content.problemStatement:
You are given an array of NNN integers where each element is less than NNN. Your task is to find the frequency of each element in the array.

**Note:** You must solve this with O(1)O(1)O(1) extra space complexity.


Input Format

First line contains TTT - the number of test cases
For each test case:

First line contains NNN - size of array
Second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,...,ANA_1, A_2, ..., A_NA1​,A2​,...,AN​ where 0≤Ai<N0 ≤ A_i < N0≤Ai​<N




Output Format

For each test case print NNN space-separated integers where ithi^{th}ith integer represents frequency of element i−1i-1i−1

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1:
Frequency of 0 is 1 
Frequency of 1 is 1 
Frequency of 2 is 0 
Frequency of 3 is 2
Test Case 2:
Element 0 appears once 
Element 1 appears once 
Element 2 appears twice 
Element 3 appears zero times 
Element 4 appears once
